name_en: New 💋💋 This Book Tote handbag is a flagship product embodying the Dior aesthetic, designed by Dior Women's Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri. Adorned with a black and gold Butterfly Zodiac pattern embroidery by Pietro Ruffo, with interwoven zodiac symbols and vibrant butterflies, it highlights the zodiac style and can hold various daily essentials. Small size, featuring a Christian Dior Paris logo on the front, showcasing Dior's exquisite craftsmanship, can be carried by hand.
name_cn:
New 💋💋 This Book Tote handbag is a flagship product embodying the Dior aesthetic, designed by Dior Women's Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri. Adorned with a black and gold Butterfly Zodiac pattern embroidery by Pietro Ruffo, with interwoven zodiac symbols and vibrant butterflies, it highlights the zodiac style and can hold various daily essentials. Small size, featuring a Christian Dior Paris logo on the front, showcasing Dior's exquisite craftsmanship, can be carried by hand.
Front featuring Christian Dior Paris logo
Includes dust bag
Dimensions: 26.5 x 21 x 14 cm
8002
